arts.ttl: How Kyogo Furuhashi really feels at Celtic after Atlanta United 'transfer' announcement
arts.sum: McGregor was then asked if he felt Kyogo was still happy at Celtic despite recent links to Atlanta United, the Hoops captain says his striker is ‘still giving his all’. “So I’m sure that the club will want to keep him as long as we can because he’s a huge player for us and, again, in sticky games like this, he can come in and make the difference and that’s what you need for your strikers.”

arts.ttl: Celtic told what would happen next season if Rangers sacked Philippe Clement
arts.sum: But Andy Walker made it clear that, if there is a new Rangers manager facing Celtic next season, he still won’t challenge the champions for the title, as he told Go Radio. Celtic told Rangers won’t challenge for the title next season

arts.ttl: Brendan Rodgers drops transfer hint as he talks up player who gives Celtic 'something different'
arts.sum: Celtic have already allowed Stephen Welsh to leave the club on loan as he looks to get some first-team football away from Celtic Park, but as yet, the Bhoys are still to add to their squad. However, that could be all about to change as Brendan Rodgers delivered a timeline on when he expects the club to do some transfer business in his post-match press conference after Celtic beat Ross County .

arts.ttl: Celtic in mix for January signing but player ‘isn’t convinced about Scotland’ – Sweet-talking would be needed
arts.sum: Two days ago, we covered claims from Italy which stated Celtic have returned for Gustav Isaksen, after failing to sign him last summer. It was also reported Brendan Rodgers’ side need €15m to buy him in the winter market. arts.ttl: Dundee vs Celtic: TV channel, live stream, team news & kick-off time
arts.sum: Dundee vs Celtic: TV channel, live stream, team news & kick-off time.

arts.ttl: Chris Sutton admits he has 'never understood' why some have been 'questioning' Celtic star
arts.sum: Celtic put their money where their mouth is by enhancing the squad, including spending a club-record transfer on midfielder, Arne Engels . Chris Sutton defends ‘questioning’ of Celtic star Arne Engels

arts.ttl: What TV channel is Dundee vs Celtic? Live stream, ref, VAR and team news for Dens Park clash
arts.sum: Table-topping Celts can move 18 points clear of Rangers, who face Aberdeen at Ibrox on Wednesday night

arts.ttl: BBC pundit is in complete denial as he puts 'up for debate' the gap between Celtic and Rangers
arts.sum: But even after all that, BBC pundit and former Rangers man, Derek Ferguson is still debating the gap between Celtic and the Ibrox club. Offering his insight on Celtic’s win against Ross County, Ferguson was told by BBC’s Kenny MacIntyre that the Hoops were ‘miles ahead’ of Rangers when he offered this alternative and slightly deluded view.

arts.ttl: Player ‘very close’ to leaving Celtic – Brendan Rodgers’ side agree deal, medical on the way
arts.sum: Four days ago, we covered claims from Spain which stated Rayo Vallecano have reached an agreement with Celtic’s Luis Palma and are working on securing a deal with Brendan Rodgers’ side. A fresh report from Estadio Deportivo now claims the winger’s move to the La Liga side has entered the ‘final phase’.
